storyBeat: 老夫婦求子 — 會生出什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 old man = 老人
🔑 old woman = 老婦
🔑 rice field = 田
🔑 pray = 祈求
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago, an old man and old woman lived by a rice field.
questions.explanationZh: 很久以前,一個老人和一個老婦住在田邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They had no children. Their house was quiet.
questions.explanationZh: 他們沒有小孩。他們的家很安靜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every night they sat by the window and looked out.
questions.questionEn: Did the old couple feel lonely?
questions.explanationZh: 沒有小孩、家裡安靜、每晚望著窗外——你感覺得到嗎?他們一定很孤單,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 每天晚上，他們坐在窗邊，靜靜地望著外面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every night they prayed for a child.
questions.explanationZh: 每個晚上,他們祈求一個小孩。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Please, please give us a child," they said softly.
questions.question: What did the old couple ask for?
options: a big new house to live in
a small child of their own
a heavy bag of gold coins
a fast horse for the farm
optionsZh: 一棟可以住的大新房子
questions.explanationZh: 他們輕聲說「給我們一個孩子吧」——就是想要一個自己的小孩。
questions.sentenceZh: 「求求你，賜給我們一個孩子吧。」他們輕聲說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Even a tiny one will do," they said.
questions.explanationZh: 「就算很小的也好,」他們說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One spring morning, the old woman heard a small cry.
questions.question: What surprised the old woman?
questions.explanationZh: heard a small cry = 聽到小小的哭聲——讓老婦人嚇到的就是那個小哭聲。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個春天的早晨，老婆婆聽見一聲細細的哭聲。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: There, in her hand, sat a tiny baby.
questions.explanationZh: 在她的手心裡,坐著一個小小的寶寶。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How big was the baby?
questions.question: How big was the baby?
options: 👍 only as tall as a thumb
questions.explanationZh: tiny baby + in her hand → 拇指那麼高。
questions.sentenceZh: 那個寶寶有多大？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的 4 個關鍵字，配對試試。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old couple had lived in the same quiet place for many years.
questions.sentenceZh: 這對老夫婦在同一個安靜的地方住了好多年。
questions.question: Where did the old couple live?
options: at the top of a hill
questions.explanationZh: by a rice field = 住在田邊——這對老夫婦的家就在田旁邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They had no children. Their house was quiet.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們沒有小孩。他們的家很安靜。
questions.questionEn: Did the old couple have a noisy, busy home?
questions.explanationZh: no children + quiet = 沒有小孩、安安靜靜——不熱鬧，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The couple had one simple wish about any child they might receive.
questions.sentenceZh: 這對夫婦對他們可能得到的孩子只有一個小小的願望。
questions.question: What size of child did the old couple ask for?
questions.explanationZh: even a tiny one will do = 就算很小的也好——他們不挑，只要有個孩子就夠了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the old woman feel when she found the tiny baby?
questions.sentenceZh: 老婆婆發現小小的寶寶時，心情怎麼樣？
questions.question: How did she feel?
questions.explanationZh: smile and cry with joy = 又笑又哭開心——驚喜又非常開心。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: There, in her hand, sat a tiny baby.
questions.sentenceZh: 在她的手心裡，坐著一個小小的寶寶。
questions.question: How big was the baby?
options: tiny enough to fit a palm
as tall as a door frame
the size of a normal newborn
questions.explanationZh: in her hand = 在她手裡——寶寶小到可以坐在手心裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every night they prayed for a child.
questions.sentenceZh: 每個晚上,他們祈求一個小孩。
questions.questionEn: Did the old couple pray only once?
questions.explanationZh: every night = 每個晚上——他們每天晚上都祈求，不只一次，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old couple smile and cry with joy. What kind of child will he be?
questions.explanationZh: 老夫婦又笑又哭,好開心。這小孩會變成怎樣呢?

storyBeat: 拇指大小的男孩 — 他能做什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 name = 名字
🔑 mean = 意思
🔑 clever = 聰明
🔑 brave = 勇敢
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They named him Issun-bōshi.
questions.explanationZh: 他們給他取名叫一寸法師。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His name meant "tiny boy" in old words.
questions.question: What did his name mean?
questions.explanationZh: tiny boy = 小小的男孩——他的名字就是「小男孩」的意思。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的名字用古語來說是「小小的男孩」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Years went by. He stayed thumb-sized.
questions.explanationZh: 很多年過去了。他還是拇指那麼大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He helped at home. He made his mother laugh.
questions.questionEn: Was Issun useless because he was so small?
questions.explanationZh: 他幫忙做事、還讓媽媽笑——這樣有用嗎?當然有用!答 No,他可不是沒用的。
questions.sentenceZh: 他在家幫忙，還會逗媽媽笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He was clever and brave, with a big heart.
questions.explanationZh: 他很聰明,也很勇敢,有一顆大大的心。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was Issun like inside?
questions.question: What was he like inside?
questions.explanationZh: clever + brave + big heart → 勇敢又有大大的心。
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸法師內心是個什麼樣的孩子？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One day, Issun said, "I want to see Kyoto."
questions.explanationZh: 有一天,一寸說:「我想去看京都。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His parents looked at each other and felt a little worried.
questions.question: How did his parents feel?
questions.explanationZh: 爸媽你看我、我看你——心裡有一點擔心,選「有一點擔心」。
questions.sentenceZh: 爸爸和媽媽對看了一眼，心裡有點擔心。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But they nodded slowly. They believed in him.
questions.explanationZh: 但他們慢慢點頭。他們相信他。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的關鍵字，配對看看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They named him Issun-bōshi.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們給他取名叫一寸法師。
questions.question: What was the tiny boy's name?
questions.explanationZh: They named him Issun-bōshi = 他叫一寸法師。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Years went by. He stayed thumb-sized.
questions.sentenceZh: 很多年過去了。他還是拇指那麼大。
questions.questionEn: Did Issun grow to normal size over the years?
questions.explanationZh: stayed thumb-sized = 還是拇指大——多年過去也沒長高，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Issun _____ clever and brave, with a big heart.
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸聰明又勇敢，有一顆大大的心。
questions.question: Choose the correct word to fill the blank.
questions.explanationZh: Issun 是「他」，說的是故事裡的往事，所以用 was（過去式）。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He was clever and brave, with a big heart.
questions.sentenceZh: 他很聰明,也很勇敢,有一顆大大的心。
questions.question: What three things describe Issun?
questions.explanationZh: clever + brave + big heart = 聰明、勇敢、有大大的心——就是這三個。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Where did Issun want to go?
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸法師想去哪裡？
questions.question: Where did he want to go?
options: 🏯 to the great city of Kyoto
🏔️ to the top of a tall mountain
questions.explanationZh: I want to see Kyoto = 我想去看京都——他的夢想是去大城市。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But they nodded slowly. They believed in him.
questions.sentenceZh: 但他們慢慢點頭。他們相信他。
questions.questionEn: Did Issun's parents have faith in him?
questions.explanationZh: nodded + believed in him = 點頭、相信他——爸媽相信他能做到，答 Yes。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Issun is tiny but clever. What can a tiny boy do out there?
questions.explanationZh: 一寸又小又聰明。一個拇指大的男孩在外面能做什麼呢?

storyBeat: 一寸帶碗船出發 — 路上會遇誰?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 needle = 縫衣針
🔑 sword = 劍
🔑 bowl = 碗
🔑 chopstick = 筷子
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother gave him a sewing needle for a sword.
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽給他一根縫衣針當作劍。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: For a thumb-sized boy, a needle was just the right size.
questions.question: Why use a needle as his sword?
questions.explanationZh: 一寸那麼小,縫衣針剛好就是他的劍——thumb-sized + just right size,就是「剛好適合小手」。
questions.sentenceZh: 對一個拇指大的男孩來說，一根縫針剛剛好。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His father gave him a rice bowl for a boat.
questions.explanationZh: 爸爸給他一個飯碗當作船。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He used a chopstick as an oar. He pushed off.
questions.questionEn: Did Issun set off down the river?
questions.explanationZh: 他用筷子當槳推了出去——出發了!答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他用筷子當槳，往前一撐，出發了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The water carried him far from home.
questions.explanationZh: 水把他帶得離家很遠。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Who did Issun wave goodbye to?
questions.question: Who did he wave at?
questions.explanationZh: waved goodbye + on the bank → 岸上的爸爸媽媽。
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸法師向誰揮手道別？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sky was big. The river was very wide.
questions.explanationZh: 天很大。河很寬。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Issun was very small, but he sat up tall and brave.
questions.question: How did Issun sit in the boat?
questions.explanationZh: sat tall + brave = 挺直身子、很勇敢——他坐得又挺又驕傲。
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸法師很小很小，但他坐得筆直，充滿勇氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day after day, the bowl floated on.
questions.explanationZh: 一天又一天,小碗一直漂著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的關鍵字，配對試試。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother gave him a sewing needle for a sword.
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽給他一根縫衣針當作劍。
questions.question: What did his mother give him to use as a sword?
options: the long pin from her hair
questions.explanationZh: a sewing needle for a sword = 縫衣針當劍——媽媽的縫衣針，對他來說剛好是劍。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His father gave him a rice bowl for a boat.
questions.sentenceZh: 爸爸給他一個飯碗當作船。
questions.questionEn: Did Issun have a real boat for his journey?
questions.explanationZh: rice bowl for a boat = 飯碗當船——不是真的船，是一個碗，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He used a chopstick as an oar. He pushed off.
questions.sentenceZh: 他用筷子當槳往前一撐,出發了。
questions.question: What did Issun use as an oar?
questions.explanationZh: chopstick as an oar = 筷子當槳——他把家裡的筷子當划船的槳。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Issun feel as he floated down the river?
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸法師漂在河上時，是什麼感覺？
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: sat up tall and brave = 挺直、勇敢——他充滿希望向前去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The water carried him far from home.
questions.sentenceZh: 水把他帶得離家很遠。
questions.question: How did Issun travel down the river?
options: he rode on a big fish
questions.explanationZh: the water carried him = 水把他帶走——他坐在碗裡，讓水流帶著走。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day after day, the bowl floated on.
questions.sentenceZh: 一天又一天,小碗一直漂著。
questions.questionEn: Did Issun arrive at the city on his very first day?
questions.explanationZh: day after day = 一天又一天——走了很多天才到，不是第一天就到，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A tiny boy in a rice bowl, going to the big city. Who will he meet on the way?
questions.explanationZh: 一個小男孩坐在飯碗裡,要去大城市。路上他會遇到誰呢?

storyBeat: 京都當侍衛 — 公主出去散步

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 city = 城市
🔑 bow = 鞠躬
🔑 princess = 公主
🔑 temple = 寺廟
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After many days, Issun reached the great city.
questions.explanationZh: 許多天之後,一寸到了大城市。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The houses were tall. The streets were full of people.
questions.question: How was the city different from home?
questions.explanationZh: 高樓房子、街上擠滿人——比老家熱鬧太多了,選「又大又熱鬧」。
questions.sentenceZh: 房子好高，街上的人好多。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He walked to a lord's house and bowed low.
questions.explanationZh: 他走到一位大人的家,深深鞠躬。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Please let me serve you," he said in a clear voice.
questions.questionEn: Did Issun ask to work for the lord?
questions.explanationZh: 「請讓我為您服務」——他想去做事,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 「請讓我為您效勞。」他用清亮的聲音說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The lord laughed kindly and said yes.
questions.explanationZh: 大人笑了笑,說好。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What job did Issun get?
questions.question: What job did he get?
questions.explanationZh: serve + lord's daughter → 公主的侍衛。
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸法師得到了什麼工作？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One bright day, the princess walked out to the temple.
questions.explanationZh: 一個晴朗的日子,公主走出去要到寺廟。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Issun stood up on her shoulder, near her ear, and watched the road.
questions.question: Where did Issun stand?
options: on a low branch above her
questions.explanationZh: 他站在公主肩膀上,靠近她耳朵看路——就是在耳朵旁邊。
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸法師站在公主的肩膀上，靠近她的耳邊，注意著前方的路。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The path led through a quiet wood.
questions.explanationZh: 路穿過一片安靜的樹林。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的 4 個關鍵字,配對看看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The journey was long, but Issun finally arrived at the city gates.
questions.sentenceZh: 旅途很遠，但一寸終於抵達了城門。
questions.question: How long did it take Issun to reach the city?
questions.explanationZh: after many days = 許多天之後——路很長，走了好幾天。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He walked to a lord's house and bowed low.
questions.sentenceZh: 他走到一位大人的家,深深鞠躬。
questions.questionEn: Was Issun rude when he met the lord?
questions.explanationZh: bowed low = 深深鞠躬——他很有禮貌，一點都不無禮，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Issun had a special place where he kept watch for danger.
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸有一個特別的位置，讓他能注意危險。
questions.question: Where did Issun stand while guarding the princess?
options: up on her shoulder by her ear
on the top of her hat
questions.explanationZh: on her shoulder near her ear = 肩上靠近耳朵——他是那樣小，才站得上去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What job did Issun ask to do?
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸法師要求做什麼工作？
questions.question: What job did he want?
questions.explanationZh: please let me serve you = 我要服侍您——他去大人家求職，成了公主的侍衛。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That bright morning, the princess had a special destination in mind.
questions.sentenceZh: 那個晴朗的早晨，公主心裡有個特別的目的地。
questions.question: Where was the princess going?
questions.explanationZh: walked out to the temple = 走去寺廟——那天公主要去寺廟。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The path led through a quiet wood.
questions.sentenceZh: 路穿過一片安靜的樹林。
questions.questionEn: Was the road to the temple open and clear?
questions.explanationZh: quiet wood = 安靜的樹林——路穿過樹林，不是開闊無礙，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wood is too quiet. Something is hiding in the trees...
questions.explanationZh: 樹林安靜得不太對勁。樹後面有東西躲著……

storyBeat: 鬼來抓公主 — 他能擋住嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 demon = 鬼
🔑 horn = 角
🔑 sharp = 尖
🔑 scared = 害怕
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Suddenly, a big red demon jumped from the trees.
questions.explanationZh: 突然,一個大紅鬼從樹林裡跳出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He had two horns and sharp teeth.
questions.question: How did the demon look?
questions.explanationZh: 兩根角、一嘴尖牙——看起來好可怕又好強壯,選「可怕又強壯」。
questions.sentenceZh: 牠有兩隻角，還有尖銳的牙齒。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I will take the princess," the demon laughed.
questions.explanationZh: 「我要把公主抓走,」鬼大笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The princess held still and could not move.
questions.questionEn: Was the princess very scared?
questions.explanationZh: 公主嚇到動不了——held still + could not move,真的很害怕,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 公主僵在那裡，動都不能動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Issun jumped down to the ground.
questions.explanationZh: 一寸跳到地上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did Issun pull out?
questions.question: What did he pull out?
questions.explanationZh: pulled out his sewing-needle sword → 縫衣針劍。
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸法師拔出了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Stop!" he shouted in his small but brave voice.
questions.explanationZh: 「住手!」他用小小但勇敢的聲音喊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demon looked down and laughed even louder.
questions.question: How did the demon react to Issun?
questions.explanationZh: 鬼往下看,笑得更大聲——他根本不把小小的一寸當回事,選「覺得他不是威脅」。
questions.sentenceZh: 鬼怪低頭看了一眼，笑得更大聲了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The big demon reached down with one huge hand.
questions.explanationZh: 大鬼用一隻大手伸下來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的關鍵字，配對看看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Without any warning, something terrible appeared in the road ahead.
questions.sentenceZh: 毫無預警，路前方出現了可怕的東西。
questions.question: What jumped out from the trees?
questions.explanationZh: a big red demon = 大紅鬼——牠突然從樹林裡跳出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He had two horns and sharp teeth.
questions.sentenceZh: 牠有兩隻角，還有尖銳的牙齒。
questions.questionEn: Did the demon look friendly?
questions.explanationZh: two horns + sharp teeth = 兩根角、尖牙——看起來很可怕，不友善，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Stop!" he _____ in his small but brave voice.
questions.sentenceZh: 「住手！」他用小小但勇敢的聲音喊。
questions.question: Choose the correct word to fill the blank.
questions.explanationZh: 說的是故事裡以前的事，動詞要用過去式。shout 的過去式是 shouted。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demon did not feel afraid of the tiny warrior at all.
questions.sentenceZh: 鬼怪完全不害怕這個小小的武士。
questions.question: How did the demon react to Issun?
questions.explanationZh: laughed even louder = 笑得更大聲——鬼根本不把他當一回事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did Issun do when the demon appeared?
questions.sentenceZh: 鬼出現時，一寸法師做了什麼？
questions.question: What did Issun do?
options: ran off into the nearby woods
questions.explanationZh: jumped down + shouted Stop = 跳到地上、大喊住手——他勇敢站出來面對鬼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The princess held still and could not move.
questions.sentenceZh: 公主僵在那裡，動都不能動。
questions.questionEn: Was the princess able to run from the demon?
questions.explanationZh: could not move = 動不了——她嚇到動彈不得，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A tiny boy stands between the demon and the princess. Can he stop him?
questions.explanationZh: 一個拇指大的男孩站在鬼跟公主中間。他擋得住嗎?

storyBeat: 一寸跳進鬼嘴用針刺 — 鬼會怎樣?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 swallow = 吞
🔑 dark = 黑暗
🔑 poke = 刺
🔑 roar = 吼叫
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demon picked up Issun and swallowed him whole.
questions.explanationZh: 鬼把一寸抓起來,整個吞了下去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Inside the demon, it was very dark.
questions.question: What was it like inside the demon?
questions.explanationZh: 裡面 very dark = 非常暗——四周都是黑暗。
questions.sentenceZh: 在鬼怪的肚子裡，黑漆漆的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But Issun was not scared. He held up his needle.
questions.explanationZh: 可是一寸不害怕。他舉起他的針。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He poked and poked the demon's tummy.
questions.questionEn: Did Issun fight back from inside?
questions.explanationZh: 他一直拿針刺鬼的肚子——這就是從裡面反擊啊,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他一戳再戳，直戳鬼怪的肚皮。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demon roared and hopped from foot to foot.
questions.explanationZh: 鬼大吼,一隻腳跳到另一隻腳。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the demon feel from inside?
questions.question: How did the demon feel?
questions.explanationZh: roar + hop foot to foot → 痛又大叫。
questions.sentenceZh: 鬼怪在裡面是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The princess covered her mouth in surprise.
questions.explanationZh: 公主嚇得用手摀住嘴。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At last, the demon spit Issun out on the ground.
questions.question: What did the demon finally do?
questions.explanationZh: spit Issun out = 把一寸噴出來——鬼忍不住了,把他放出來。
questions.sentenceZh: 終於，鬼怪把一寸法師「噗」地吐到地上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demon gave up and ran away into the wood.
questions.explanationZh: 鬼放棄了,跑進樹林裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的 4 個關鍵字，配對看看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demon reached down and did something very shocking to Issun.
questions.sentenceZh: 鬼伸下手，對一寸做了非常驚人的事。
questions.question: What did the demon do to Issun?
questions.explanationZh: swallowed him whole = 把他整個吞了——鬼把一寸吞進肚子裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But Issun was not scared. He held up his needle.
questions.sentenceZh: 可是一寸不害怕。他舉起他的針。
questions.questionEn: Did Issun give up when he was swallowed?
questions.explanationZh: not scared + held up his needle = 不怕、舉起針——他沒有放棄，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He poked and poked the demon's tummy.
questions.sentenceZh: 他一戳再戳，直戳鬼怪的肚皮。
questions.question: What did Issun do inside the demon?
options: used his needle on the tummy
looked hard for a way out
questions.explanationZh: poked and poked the tummy = 一直戳肚子——他用針刺從裡面反攻。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the demon finally end the fight?
questions.sentenceZh: 鬼怪最後是怎麼結束這場戰鬥的？
questions.question: What did the demon do?
questions.explanationZh: spit Issun out = 把一寸噴出來——肚子太痛，只好把他噴出去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After being poked so many times, the demon made a surprising choice.
questions.sentenceZh: 被戳了那麼多次之後，鬼做了一個讓人意外的決定。
questions.question: What did the demon do after spitting Issun out?
questions.explanationZh: gave up + ran away = 放棄、跑走——鬼承認打不過，逃跑了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demon roared and hopped from foot to foot.
questions.sentenceZh: 鬼大吼,一隻腳跳到另一隻腳。
questions.questionEn: Did the needle pokes have no effect on the demon?
questions.explanationZh: roared + hopped = 大吼、跳腳——針的效果非常大，鬼痛得亂跳，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The demon drops a small wooden mallet behind him. What can it do?
questions.explanationZh: 鬼留下一個小小的木槌。這個木槌會做什麼呢?

storyBeat: 打鼓變大人娶公主 — 變大那刻

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 lucky = 幸運
🔑 mallet = 木槌
🔑 tap = 敲
🔑 grow = 長大
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The princess picked up the small wooden mallet.
questions.explanationZh: 公主拿起那個小木槌。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "This is a lucky mallet. It can grant a wish."
questions.question: What kind of mallet was it?
questions.explanationZh: grant a wish = 實現願望——這是一把能實現願望的魔法槌。
questions.sentenceZh: 「這是一支幸運小槌，可以實現願望。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She tapped the mallet once, just for Issun.
questions.explanationZh: 她敲了一下槌子,就為一寸。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: With each soft tap, Issun grew taller.
questions.questionEn: Did the mallet make Issun bigger?
questions.explanationZh: 每敲一下就長高一點——槌子讓他越變越大,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 每輕輕敲一下，一寸法師就長高一點。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Tap. Tap. Tap.
questions.explanationZh: 敲。敲。敲。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What happened to Issun?
questions.question: What happened to him?
options: 💤 he fell into a deep sleep
questions.explanationZh: tap tap tap + grew taller → 越變越高。
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸法師怎麼了？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Soon he stood as tall as any young man.
questions.explanationZh: 很快,他就跟一般年輕人一樣高。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at his own hands and smiled wide.
questions.question: How did Issun feel about his new size?
questions.explanationZh: 他看著自己的手,笑得好開心——長大了!選「開心又驚喜」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他看著自己的雙手，露出了大大的笑容。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They walked back to the city, side by side.
questions.explanationZh: 他們一起走回城市,肩並肩。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的關鍵字，配對試試。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "This is a lucky mallet. It can grant a wish."
questions.sentenceZh: 「這是一支幸運小槌，可以實現願望。」
questions.question: What was special about the mallet?
questions.explanationZh: grant a wish = 實現願望——那把小木槌有魔力，能實現願望。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: With each soft tap, Issun grew taller.
questions.sentenceZh: 每輕輕敲一下，一寸法師就長高一點。
questions.questionEn: Did Issun grow all at once with one tap?
questions.explanationZh: with each tap = 每敲一下長一點——他是一點一點長高，不是一下子，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Soon he stood as tall as any young man.
questions.sentenceZh: 很快,他就跟一般年輕人一樣高。
questions.question: How tall did Issun become?
options: only a bit taller than before
as tall as a normal young man
questions.explanationZh: as tall as any young man = 跟一般年輕人一樣高——他長成正常大小了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What is the main lesson of Issun-boshi's story?
questions.sentenceZh: 一寸法師故事的最重要啟示是什麼？
questions.question: What is the lesson?
optionsZh: 勇敢的心才是最重要的
questions.explanationZh: 小小身體、大大的心——他靠勇氣打敗了鬼，勇敢的心才是最重要的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at his own hands and smiled wide.
questions.sentenceZh: 他看著自己的雙手，露出了大大的笑容。
questions.question: How did Issun feel after he grew to full size?
options: happy and amazed at his size
optionsZh: 對自己的新身材開心又驚喜
questions.explanationZh: smiled wide = 大大的笑容——他開心又驚喜，長大了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They walked back to the city, side by side.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們一起走回城市,肩並肩。
questions.questionEn: Did Issun walk back alone?
questions.explanationZh: side by side = 肩並肩——他跟公主一起走，不是一個人，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Issun and the princess become family. He is big enough now to start a home...
questions.explanationZh: 一寸和公主成為一家人。他現在夠大了,可以開始自己的家……
